'''Nyantolo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] who was part of an expedition exploring the swamps of [[Wyndigal 2]]. During the expedition, he came too close to an unknown creature. The creature suddenly swept Nyantolo's legs out from under him, and crushed his head with its strong beak.<ref name="COG" />

After Nyantolo's death, his comrade named the creature a "[[Nyantolo (creature)|nyantolo]]" in his honor.<ref name="COG" />
